verificationNote: Requirements constructed from CSA CCM v4, NIST CSF 2.0, and Malaysia Act 854 obligations. Verify against authoritative sources before use in formal assessments.

domain.name: Serverless Security
domain.description: Requirements for securing serverless compute (functions-as-a-service) and API gateway architectures. Serverless shifts infrastructure security responsibility to the CSP but introduces new attack vectors around function configuration, event injection, and dependency management.

requirements.title: Serverless Function Security Configuration
requirements.description: Secure serverless functions with dedicated least-privilege IAM roles, encrypted environment variables, appropriate timeout and memory limits, and VPC placement for functions accessing private resources. Implement input validation for all event sources to prevent injection attacks.

cspGuidance.aws: Create per-function IAM roles with minimal policies (no * resources). Store secrets in Secrets Manager or Parameter Store. Place functions in VPC when accessing RDS or ElastiCache. Set concurrency limits.
cspGuidance.azure: Use Managed Identity per Function App (system-assigned preferred). Reference secrets from Key Vault. Deploy in VNet-integrated App Service Plan for private resource access. Configure CORS and authentication.
cspGuidance.gcp: Use per-function service accounts with minimal permissions. Mount secrets from Secret Manager. Use VPC connectors for private resource access. Set maximum instances and timeout limits.

requirements.title: API Gateway Security
requirements.description: Secure API gateways with authentication (OAuth 2.0/OIDC), request schema validation, rate limiting, and TLS enforcement. Apply WAF rules to API endpoints. Implement per-client throttling and usage plans to prevent abuse.

cspGuidance.aws: Use API Gateway with Cognito or Lambda authorizers. Configure usage plans with API keys for rate limiting. Enable request validation. Deploy WAF on API Gateway for OWASP protection.
cspGuidance.azure: Use Azure API Management with OAuth 2.0 inbound policies. Configure rate limiting and throttling policies. Enable request validation. Integrate with Entra ID for authentication.
cspGuidance.gcp: Use Cloud Endpoints or Apigee. Configure API keys and OAuth with Identity Platform. Apply quota policies per client. Deploy Cloud Armor for API protection.

requirements.title: Serverless Dependency Scanning
requirements.description: Scan serverless function dependencies for known vulnerabilities in CI/CD pipelines. Monitor deployed functions for newly disclosed CVEs in their dependency tree. Block deployment of functions with unresolved critical vulnerabilities. Generate SBOM for all serverless deployments.

cspGuidance.aws: Use Inspector for Lambda function scanning. Integrate Snyk or OWASP Dependency-Check in CodePipeline. Enable Lambda code signing to verify deployment integrity.
cspGuidance.azure: Use Defender for Cloud DevOps security for function scanning. Integrate Snyk or GitHub Dependabot in Azure Pipelines. Enable function app authentication and HTTPS-only.
cspGuidance.gcp: Use Artifact Analysis for dependency scanning. Integrate in Cloud Build. Enable Software Delivery Shield for supply chain visibility. Scan Cloud Functions deployment packages.
